display: Help me migrate my old content into the PAI/USER/ structure.
/Interview

I want to 100x my productivity. This is across everything from work, personal, business, innvoation. I am currently job searching, I have multiple roles within LIfesaving that I need to be a gun at, I have two SaaS products I want to build and grow. I want to be a leader in the AI space. These goals will continue to evolve

I would like to do a career pivot to become a digital strategy consultant. I eseentially want to broaden my scope from just engineering. The SaaS products are AccessBuddy and LifesaverOnCall. Information on both of these will be available when I migrate my pai 4x files. I am the state lifesaving communications officer for LIfe Saving Victoria. I want to be the champion of more progess than anyone has ever seen. I want to be the guy that everyone goes to for advise on strategic and policy matters across the lifesaving operations domain. What should be next?

I am curious on how my approach of md files in ~/Documents/workspace with projects, agents etc. aligns to the updated version of pai? A few things I want to consider: 1. I want to make an impact through a range of roles. That includes both work and Surf LIfe Saving
Sure move on

I'm not sure where that list came from. But I can summarise my goals. I want to transition into the business side of tech. My long term career goals are to be C-suite/board level contributor with a skillset in digital. I want to get in good phsyical shape. Eat well and a physique I am proud of. High achieving people are healthy people. I want to lean into the AI way. I want to innovate with my own businesses. Surf Life Saving is my passion, and I want to use that as both an outlet for what I enjoy, and a skill.reputation builder. There is a real opportunity to build up LIMSOC and operational communications in this space. Then I want to have a balanced life. Nothing more importantn than relationships, family, friends and significant others. Financially, I want to run a 0 based budget and be positioning myself for long term wealth. I want a net wealth of $1M by no later than 35.
The voice notifications are working.

LIMSOC, it is a continuous improvement piece. It is good, but like any tech if it doesn't continue to eveolve to meet needs and new opportunities it will fall behind. Lots of opportunity here. Lifesaver on call, call outs are done by static lists at the moment. AccessBuddy: VOlunteers take 1000s of emails to administer club access. This automates all of it. AI: I want to 100x my potential.

1.content:
I’m a product-focused engineer working across technology, product and strategy to deliver outcomes that hold up in the real world. I’ve increasingly focused on problems that require more than just technical delivery, bringing structure, alignment and clear decision-making to complex environments with multiple stakeholders and competing priorities, including direct engagement with executive and C-suite stakeholders. My goal is to continue expanding the impact I can have by combining strong technical foundations with product thinking and strategic perspective.
 
I value working with strong people and learning quickly from those around me. I tend to form clear views and contribute actively, but I hold them loosely. If there is a better idea, I want to find it. I am most engaged when the problem is difficult, the path is not obvious, and the work requires both depth and breadth to get right.

display: When it comes to wisdom, what do you thinnk of this dump of quotes I really like [Pasted text #2 +207 lines]
I generally really like what I have put in there. Please proceed with breaking these up.
What are the questions these three should answer?

Freedom to me, I would like to be able to live without financial stress. For me that means being quite well off, nice car, holidays, eating out. I would like to be well off enough that I can enjoy the extras. I would like to be in a job that I love, with fufilment from the impact i can have in that role. I want to be a leader. I want to be able to have the flexibility to enjoy a life with family. I am happy to have to work hard, as long as I can also enjoy the rewards of that and spend suitable time doing what I enjoy. If I enjoy work that obviously opens up alot. In terms of the mix, I want to have impact, I want to have purpose. However I get that I don't mind. Whilst I would like to have my own business, I wouldn't want to forse this. The main constraint I want gone is having to worry about money. I want to have4 the nice house, the nice car, be able to do nice things with my friends and shout people who may be less fortunate than me. For relationships, I want a wife and Kids, they will be my number 1, I want to be fully present and available for them. Friends are really important to me. I want friends I can rely on, have fun with, and can be challenged by. I want to work with people I admire and push me to be better. For Community, I want to be engagemd in a community that involves giving back to others, and I want to be in that community with like minded people. That purpose in community is very valuaable to me because I think you get more out than you put in.  Creative: I want to be challenged, and I want to be able to use my skills to give things to others. I am best when I am in the servie of others. In terms of what would I regret not doing, it would be taking the opportunity to do a project that could have real lasting imact. Ins of the identity I want to grow into, I want to be respected and admired for my intellect, if I say something it is worth listening to, people seek out my council, and if I do something it will be done well .

Yes please. For sparks, it really centres around my two products. I want to start marketing access buddy, I want to finish lifesaver on call and get it ready for users. I'm really keen to also get this AI set up humming, including a home box
Can you please rebuild pulse first
How is the agent started by telegram going?
It's failed to fix my project agents 5 times.

I would like the Telegram bot to spin up an agent to do it so I don't run into that problem. Life-chief-of-staff and da were supposed to have been merged. There shouldn't have been anything for telegram to find. Please ensure I only have on agent for this purpose.
They both worked

I will keep working on this mac, the linux laptop will be my always on box. Accessed through telegram and tailscale

Yes onboard. Always delegate aggressively
